description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). A regional area code overlay has changed the '312' area code to '872' for our Chicago office. Your task is to locate all BuildingTech Solutions users who currently have a '312' area code in their phone number and update their phone number to use the '872' area code instead. Keep the rest of the phone number exactly the same. Do NOT modify the phone numbers of any other users (such as those with 415, 773, or 847 area codes).
